title: oncoba schweinfurthii
intro: Oncoba schweinfurthii, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is commonly known as the 'African Pear' tree due to its edible fruit resembling a pear. The medicinal properties of Oncoba schweinfurthii include its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and malaria, thanks to its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncoba schweinfurthii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Oncoba schweinfurthii is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically for its medicinal properties.
